0.body: Preferred contact: LinkedIn Staff Archetype: Right Hand I am a Staff Software Engineer with over 15 years of experience in software development. I specialize in building highly resilient, fault-tolerant, and scalable microservices-oriented infrastructure. I have worked on various projects across different industries, including e-commerce, conversational commerce, telecommunications, and finance. I enjoy working in challenging environments where I can apply my knowledge and skills to solve complex problems. I am also passionate about learning new technologies and applying them to my projects. On a personal level, I am proactive, responsible, a strong team player, and highly results-oriented. My hobbies include mountain biking, traveling, and spending time with my family. I am a proud father and husband.
0.title: Overview

15.body: Throughout my career, I haven't focused heavily on collecting certifications, as I have continually leaned mostly towards hands-on experience and building real-world solutions. However, I have obtained some key certifications that validate my expertise in specific areas, particularly in conversational commerce and networking. I have extensive practical experience working directly with Meta's ecosystem, including WhatsApp, Messenger, and Instagram, as well as specialized knowledge in managing Meta Business Portfolios, Embedded Sign-Up flows, and more.
15.title: Certifications

16.body: Information about certification This certification validates my technical capabilities in implementing and managing WhatsApp Business API solutions. My experience goes far beyond the certification itself, as I have spent years integrating and scaling complex conversational flows on WhatsApp, Messenger, and Instagram for enterprise clients. I am highly proficient in navigating the Meta ecosystem, structuring business portfolios, and streamlining client onboarding through Embedded Sign-Up processes.
16.breadcrumbs: Resume » Certifications » Meta: WhatsApp for Business Technical Implementation
16.title: Meta: WhatsApp for Business Technical Implementation

17.body: Information about certification While this is an older certification from the early stages of my career, my Cisco Certified Network Associate (CCNA) training provided me with a rock-solid foundation in networking principles. Understanding how routing, switching, and network protocols work at a fundamental level has been invaluable in my current role when architecting distributed microservices, debugging complex network-level issues, and designing resilient cloud infrastructure.
17.title: Cisco: CCNA - 1 & 2

18.body: My native language is Spanish. However, I completed 14 out of 20 modules at the Academia Europea in Guatemala and have continued to develop my English skills throughout my professional career. This allows me to express myself accurately and eloquently, and to communicate seamlessly with people from all over the world.
18.title: Languages

2.body: This section outlines the professional experience I have gained throughout my career. I will try to highlight the most relevant aspects, given that my professional journey started when I was 18 years old and I've been through several stages of professional growth. I will omit the Junior Developer roles (Nov 2011 to Feb 2018) from the early days of my career, but feel free to ask if you'd like to know more about my background.
2.title: Overview

20.body: I am always looking for new things to learn and ways to grow as a professional. My main interest is working with infrastructure and solving complex problems. I really enjoy the idea of building scalable and resilient systems. Secondly, I'm very passionate about AI. I am currently exploring the world of Artificial Intelligence to solve real-day problems and automate repetitive tasks on a personal level. Professionally, I continue to work on production-level AI implementations for our products.
20.title: Interests

21.title: Technology Stack & Preferences

3.body: Yalo · Nov 2020 - Present · 5 yrs 5 mos My current and most impactful journey so far. At Yalo, I've had the opportunity to develop myself in various aspects, both technical and non-technical, which have allowed me to grow as a professional and as a person. I have developed complex, resilient, event-driven infrastructure using Kafka as a highly fault-tolerant event engine, and evolved the logic of how events are processed within the company. I've led initiatives to migrate from monoliths to microservices, implemented modern design patterns, and participated in defining the overall software architecture. This has brought tangible business benefits such as increased efficiency, significant cost reduction, and the viability to attract and scale with new clients in the future. Used technologies: Golang Kafka Python Google Cloud Stack Docker Git Datadog Prometheus AI Implementations with OpenAI Just to mention a few...
3.breadcrumbs: Resume » Work Experience » Staff Software Engineer
3.title: Staff Software Engineer

4.body: Cartful Solutions · Jun 2019 - Nov 2020 · 1 yr 6 mos I was in charge of developing new features. Cartful offers custom search engines for e-commerce companies. I developed an information ingestion system for the search engine, which allowed processing and storing data from various sources into a NoSQL database. This information was then used by the search engine to provide both static and dynamic recommendations based on scoring/popularity and business rules. Technologies used: AWS cloud platform (S3, DynamoDB, Lambdas, Step Functions, CloudWatch Events) JavaScript React Java Just to mention a few...
4.breadcrumbs: Resume » Work Experience » Senior Full-stack Developer
4.title: Senior Full-stack Developer

5.body: Ubiquo Labs · Feb 2018 - Jun 2019 · 1 yr 5 mos In charge of maintaining and developing the company's internal platform, which is used by companies like TIGO Guatemala, TIGO Honduras, Claro Central America, banks, and other clients. I developed several services in Python and Java, implemented modern design patterns, and participated in defining the overall software architecture. I also created new Java implementations using Spring Boot to build microservices that simplified development. Managed a small team of around 3 junior developers. Used technologies: Python React JS Java / Spring Boot Node.js Scrum AWS (VPC, EC2, SES, Lambda) Just to mention a few...
5.breadcrumbs: Resume » Work Experience » Senior Software Developer
5.title: Senior Software Developer

6.body: Throughout my career, I've had the opportunity to collaborate on various projects, which allowed me to develop my skills in multiple areas. It has been a journey of continuous learning, giving me the chance to constantly improve both the technical and non-technical skills I possess. I have certainly leaned more towards a technical path because it's what I'm most passionate about, but I've also successfully taken on leadership and team management roles. These roles have helped me develop soft skills that are just as crucial for a project's success. In this section, you'll find a breakdown of the technical, non-technical, and interpersonal skills I have developed and honed throughout my professional career.
6.title: Skills
